commit.message:
fix(ci): push provenance to triggering branch, not hardcoded main

main is protected (requires Security Scan Summary status check).
Use git push origin HEAD:${{ github.ref_name }} so the provenance
commit lands on release/rc1 when triggered from that branch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): use GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF for keyless verify-blob identity

The hardcoded --certificate-identity referenced the wrong org
(x0tta6bl4 vs x0tta6bl4-ai) and wrong workflow file (ci.yml vs
ebpf-release-signing.yml). Use GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF which GitHub
Actions sets automatically to the exact subject embedded in the
keyless OIDC certificate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): remove explicit SIGSTORE_ID_TOKEN check in keyless signing

cosign uses GitHub Actions ambient OIDC credentials automatically when
the workflow has id-token: write — passing --identity-token manually
is redundant and caused the workflow to fail because the env var was
never explicitly exported.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(5g): mark Open5GS E2E as VERIFIED on live cluster

Full 5G registration and PDU session established on VPS 89.125.1.107:
- Fixed UDR FATAL crash: missing session.name (DNN) in MongoDB subscriber
- Fixed SCP→NRF routing in all NF configs (AMF/AUSF/UDM/UDR/PCF/SMF/BSF/NSSF)
- Fixed NRF address 127.0.0.200 → 127.0.0.10 globally
- Added /dev/net/tun to UERANSIM UE container for TUN allocation
- Fixed conntrack dual-path conflict with NOTRACK + ip rule iif ogstun
- Added NAT masquerade for 10.45.0.0/16 via eth0

Result: nr-binder ping 8.8.8.8 = 0% loss, RTT ~1ms; HTTP via 5G returns VPS IP.
Updates RC1.1 backlog Stream 3: Live Open5GS E2E → [x] DONE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix departure/arrival URLs for all airports with official sources

Updated BGW, DXB, IST with user-provided correct URLs. Replaced
flightradar24 fallback URLs with official airport website URLs for
30+ major airports across Middle East, Turkey, and Europe.

funnel: per-slot menu items + supplements in order flow

  useEventMenuItems when no slot config exists

- Supplement picker with quantity controls (−/+) per item per slot

- useEventMenuItems now exposes is_supplement and unit_price fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Optimize build pipeline: WOFF2 fonts, cssnano minification, shared demo CSS

- Convert 37 TTF fonts to WOFF2 (5.5 MB → 2.4 MB, 59% smaller)
- Stop base64-inlining fonts in CSS — load as external cacheable files
- Add cssnano minification to PostCSS build (CSS: 6.2 MB → 307 KB, 95% reduction)
- Add font-display: swap to all @font-face rules (eliminates FOIT)
- Extract shared demo CSS to _docs.css, remove ~3,000 lines of duplication across 30 pages
- Add fonts:copy build step to copy WOFF2 files to dist/fonts/
- Clean tailwind.config.js: remove unused .razor/.cshtml globs
- Update .gitignore: exclude screenshots, .br files, dist/fonts/
- Enable gzip compression on dev server
- Remove unused postcss-url and ttf2woff2 dependencies

commit.message:
Persist web theme across page refreshes

- _load_theme_prefs(): loads saved theme from local file (laptop) or
  GitHub web_prefs.json (cloud) on first page load
- _save_theme_prefs(): saves to local file in local mode, GitHub in cloud
- _persist_theme_if_changed(): auto-saves only when theme hash changes
  (avoids redundant API calls on every Streamlit rerun)
- local_exists computed before _init_theme() so save destination is known
- Add json and os imports at module level

* fix: bump gunicorn timeout to 300s — apply-pending-configs was timing out

The cron endpoint iterates tenants making Azure API calls across 3
stages (config, image, cron-seed). The 120s gunicorn timeout was
killing workers before completion, causing hourly QStash failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use --project-id in db:types script to avoid interactive DB password prompt

--linked connects via direct Postgres and requires an interactive password
when stdout is redirected, silently producing empty output. --project-id
uses the Supabase Management API (CLI login token only) and works correctly
with > redirection. Also regenerate database.types.ts from live schema to
include opted_out_at, last_message_at, and tool_use_block columns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Expand color palette and improve color mapping in WooCommerce (#28)

* Add hex color mappings for all WooCommerce product colors

Expand mapColorToHex() from ~12 colors to 40+ colors covering all product
color attributes (Royal Blue, Sky Blue, Burgundy, Wine, Emerald, Olive, etc.).
Refactor to case-insensitive lookup. Update tag-based color fallback arrays
in all 3 product fetch functions to recognize the full set of color names.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01LNdCjGgWPjo6zFCAp6fZ9J

* Fix Panties category showing no products

Two root causes fixed:
1. Pagination: getWooProducts() only fetched first 100 products (per_page=100).
   Now paginates through all pages using x-wp-totalpages header.
2. Category mapping: mapCategory() only checked the first category name and
   could miss "Panties" if products had multiple categories. Now iterates all
   categories and also matches by slug. Checks panties/pants/briefs before
   bra to avoid false matches. Added Arabic category name support.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01LNdCjGgWPjo6zFCAp6fZ9J

commit.message:
fix(web): improve feedback widget visual confirmation and fix lint warnings (#18)

## Summary
- Feedback widget star ratings now use gold color (`text-yellow-500`)
with glow effect instead of default text color, making state changes
clearly visible
- Added inline "✓ 已儲存" confirmation text with fade animation and
first-time toast notification via sonner
- Strengthened difficulty button selected state (`bg-primary/10`,
`font-medium`, `shadow-sm`)
- Added early return to skip duplicate submissions when clicking the
same value
- Removed two unused `fmt` variables in streak service tests (lint
warnings)

## Motivation
Users reported no visible UI change after submitting feedback — stars
and difficulty buttons used near-identical styling for selected vs
unselected states, with no explicit save confirmation.

## Test Plan
- Type check passes (`tsc --noEmit`)
- ESLint passes with 0 warnings
- Streak service tests pass (8/8)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
Add roles system and admin dashboard (Phase 1)

Introduces Standard/Admin user roles enforced at the database level
via a profiles table and RLS policies. Admins see a Dashboard link
in the hamburger menu that navigates to /admin — a full-screen view
showing four platform-wide usage metrics (users, lists, items,
organize calls). Organize events are now persisted to a new
organize_events table after every successful API call.

Frontend changes:
- useAuth: fetches and exposes role ('standard' | 'admin' | null)
- HamburgerMenu: conditional Dashboard link for admin role
- AdminDashboard: new component with stat cards; auth-guards non-admins
- App.tsx: wires role, tracks organize events post-success
- main.tsx: adds /admin route
- useCategorize: organize() now returns boolean success indicator

Requires Supabase migration (see spec for SQL).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: MetaMask / Ethereum payment integration

Add full crypto deposit flow: MetaMask wallet connection, ETH-to-AUD
conversion via CoinGecko price feed, on-chain transaction verification,
and automatic balance crediting after block confirmations.

New files:
- server/routes/crypto.routes.js — price feed, tx verification, deposit credit
- js/crypto-wallet.js — MetaMask connect, send ETH, confirmation polling

Modified:
- index.html — ethers.js v6 CDN (async), crypto-wallet.js script tag
- js/ui-wallet.js — MetaMask deposit section in wallet modal, live ETH/AUD rate
- server/index.js — crypto route registration, CSP for CDN + CoinGecko + ETH RPC
- server/config.js — CRYPTO_WALLET_ADDRESS, ETH_RPC_URL, ETH_CHAIN_ID env vars

Set CRYPTO_WALLET_ADDRESS in .env or Render env to enable. QA passes.
